title: equisetum majus
intro: Equisetum majus, also known as scouring rush or horse tail, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Equisetaceae family, making it the sole living genus of the class Equisetopsida. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Equisetum majus include its ability to alleviate conditions such as arthritis, gout, and urinary tract infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce blood sugar levels. Equisetum majus is commonly prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be found in various supplement forms, including capsules and tablets.
